title: versioning — HTTP middleware
description: One middleware: `versioning.resolve`. Runs the resolver chain, populates request state, emits response headers (X-API-Version, Deprecation, Sunset, Link: rel=successor-version). Registered at priority 30 in foundation's canonical order — was foundation's `api.version` slot.

middleware.description: Runs the VersionResolverChain in configured order (default: url, header, query, webhook, graphql). First resolver returning a non-null result wins. Populates request-scoped bindings so controllers + Data classes can vary payload shape by version. Emits response headers per RFC 8594 for deprecated/sunset versions.
sideEffects: Emits X-API-Version: <slug> header on every response.
For state=deprecated: emits Deprecation: true + Sunset: <RFC 7231 date> headers.
For deprecated versions with migration_guide_url set: emits Link: <url>; rel="successor-version" header.
For state=sunset: refuses request with 410 Gone + emits sunset + Link headers for archaeology.

returnsOn406.reason: The version resolved by the chain doesn't exist in api_versions table. Almost always a mis-authored Accept header or URL path segment.

returnsOn410.reason: The requested version is in state=sunset. Response body includes migration_guide_url when available.

priorityContext.note: Priority 30 was foundation's former api.version slot. Placed BEFORE auth so unauthenticated requests still emit the correct version headers on 401 responses.
